name: Main Street Capital Corporation
description: Main Street Capital Corporation is a principal investment firm based in Houston, Texas, that provides long-term debt and equity capital to lower middle market companies and debt capital to private companies. The firm partners with entrepreneurs, business owners, and management teams to facilitate management buyouts, recapitalizations, growth financings, and acquisitions. By offering customized, "one-stop" capital solutions, Main Street Capital helps businesses realize their full potential while building long-term relationships. With over 20 years of experience, the firm operates across diverse industry sectors and geographic regions, focusing on companies with annual revenues typically ranging from $10 million to $500 million.
